heading: Membership in other organizations
label: 3906 Membership in other organizations
text: Members of the Auxiliary may be appointed or enlisted in the Reserve, pursuant to applicable regulations, and membership in the Auxiliary shall not be a bar to membership in any other naval or military organization.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 264 (, title I, § 5, ).Feb. 19, 1941, ch. 855 Stat. 10Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
